title: Purple-Gui
description: changes to the minecraft gui making it dark and purple!
body:
Purple Hotbar Resource Pack 
A Minecraft texture pack that changes the boring Minecraft GUI into a clean purple GUI, this pack comes with alot of Features 

## Features✨:

- A cool purple background.
- Purple minecraft icon.
- Purple ingame ui for hearts, food and xp.
- Purple Server screen 
- Mods support like
[Modmenu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) [VoiceChat](https://modrinth.com/mod/simple-voice-chat) [Apple skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) ...

![ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67f622e15aa7dedfb1945bc3c95a8ef95049c566_0.webp)
  
you need [Apple skin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) for the food bar to work
